name: foodscroll-root
description: Root package to manage microservices startup

scripts.start:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "NATS,CUSTOMER,GATEWAY,IDENTITY,LOCATION" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,green" "npm run start:nats" "npm run start:customer" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:identity" "npm run start:location"
scripts.start:customer: wait-on tcp:5590 && cd customer-service && npm run start:dev
scripts.start:gateway: wait-on tcp:5561 && cd gateway && npm run start:dev
scripts.start:identity: wait-on tcp:3000 && cd identity-service && npm run start:dev
scripts.start:location: wait-on tcp:5560 && cd location-service && npm run start:dev
